title: Present Perfect
description: Connect the past to the present with have/has + past participle
summary_pt_br: Present perfect — have/has + particípio passado, conectando passado e presente.

exercises.question: I ___ to Rio three times.
exercises.explanation: Experiences: have + past participle. 'Been' is the participle of 'be'.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para experiências de vida, use 'have/has' + particípio passado.

exercises.question: She ___ (just/finish) her homework.
exercises.explanation: Recent completion — 'just' sits between 'has' and the participle.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'Just' fica entre 'has' e o particípio para ações recém-terminadas.

pairs: I have lived here for 5 years
exercises.explanation: Note: in Portuguese these are often present-tense; in English we use present perfect.
exercises.hint_pt_br: No português muitas vezes é presente; no inglês usamos present perfect.

exercises.question: Complete: "Yes, I have been to ___."
exercises.explanation: The full phrase is: "Yes, I have been to Argentina."

exercises.question: Pick the best response. (HAVE TRIED.)
options: Yes, I have tried it many times.
exercises.explanation: The correct response is: "Yes, I have tried it many times."

scenes.subtitle_en: Connect the past to the present with have/has + past participle

exercise.question: I ___ to Rio three times.
exercise.explanation: Experiences: have + past participle. 'Been' is the participle of 'be'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Para experiências de vida, use 'have/has' + particípio passado.

exercise.question: She ___ (just/finish) her homework.
exercise.explanation: Recent completion — 'just' sits between 'has' and the participle.
exercise.hint_pt_br: 'Just' fica entre 'has' e o particípio para ações recém-terminadas.

pairs: I have lived here for 5 years
exercise.explanation: Note: in Portuguese these are often present-tense; in English we use present perfect.
exercise.hint_pt_br: No português muitas vezes é presente; no inglês usamos present perfect.

exercise.question: Complete: "Yes, I have been to ___."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "Yes, I have been to Argentina."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (HAVE TRIED.)
options: Yes, I have tried it many times.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Yes, I have tried it many times."

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have been to Argentina.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have tried it many times.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you seen the new movie?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I have not seen it yet.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you met the new teacher?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have already met her.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you lived here?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have lived here for five years.

scenes.title: Listening story — Present Perfect
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Interviewer and a student. Connect the past to the present with have/has + past participle Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I have been to Argentina.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I have tried it many times.

paragraphs.speaker: Interviewer
paragraphs.en: Have you seen the new movie?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: No, I have not seen it yet.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Interviewer. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.
